title: Borah Goldstein Altschuler Nahins & Goidel ransomware incident

extortion.description: Borah, Goldstein, Altschuler, Nahins & Goidel, P.C. specializes in residential and commercial properties law. All the info we haveon their clients and projects will be uploaded here. Lot's of documents with pieces of personal information could be found in thefiles.
